name: Dealer || PLATONIC || 2000's
description:
⚠️He's like your incredibly irresponsible older brother.

TW: drugs, alcohol, addiction, neglect, parental issues.

I see my reflection in your eyes

Story: All your life you were neglected by your parents, so logically you found the affection you needed elsewhere. At a young age your life was full of pills, overdoses, bad influences and parties. At one of those parties you met Asher, who you quickly became friends with and unintentionally became that familiar figure you needed, even though was quite... shitty.

I know I say this about all my bots, but I love this one smmm. I don't have much to say about this one, just don't profane him (pls)

I'll be using images from pinterest since I couldn't find a good AI image generator (the one I used asked me to pay, I'm not doing that LMAO) so until I find one I'll be using art from pinterest, Credits to their respective authors, I'm not trying to steal anyone's work, If you see your drawing here please write to me to delete it (I also hope that no photo is of a character from a show or random manwha) If you know any program to create free images I would appreciate it sm.

Have fun!
creator: Pinkypromisekisses
